title: Moving to Prague
description: Landing in a new city that I will be calling home for the next few years(maybe?). With anxiety and excitement, new life begins.
coverAlt: Václav Havel Airport Prague illuminated at night under a misty sky

images.caption: The most beautiful things in Prague IMO is the light.

images.alt: The exterior of Václav Havel Airport Prague at night, PRAHA sign glowing above the terminal entrance
images.caption: Arrival — Václav Havel Airport on a foggy February night
